checks.name: clean_10_gate
checks.summary: Local clean evidence gate has failures.

claim_boundaries: Protocol correctness, validation, governance and auditability may be claimed from code and test evidence.
Operational acceptance, economic performance and advantage claims require acceptance artifacts.
Synthetic or local benchmark evidence must be labelled as synthetic/local benchmark evidence.
next_actions: Resolve missing or warning evidence checks before making unqualified operational claims.
Resolve any local clean evidence gate failures before describing the repo as clean.
